task.title: Mathematical Sequence
task.prompt: Analyze this sequence: 2, 3, 5, 7, 11, 13, 17, 19, 23, ?. Identify the pattern and predict the next number. Explain your reasoning.

task.title: Probability Problem

task.title: Cryptarithmetic Puzzle
task.prompt: Solve this cryptarithmetic puzzle: SEND + MORE = MONEY. Each letter represents a unique digit (0-9). Find the values of S, E, N, D, M, O, R, Y.
